retrieved_note: Re-verified 2026-05-25 against habibmetro.com product pages and the Schedule of Charges 1 Jan to 30 Jun 2026 (English) PDF.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.18 (section 8) confirms Platinum issuance/annual/re-issuance fee PKR 7,500.
SOC eligibility footnote: 'ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA FOR PLATINUM DEBIT CARD: 3 MILLION AVERAGE BALANCE FOR LAST 3 MONTHS'.
Supplementary card fee 'will be the same as those of primary cards' per SOC section 8.
Salary not published as a separate threshold; eligibility is balance-based.
SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.18 (section 8) confirms Gold issuance/annual/re-issuance fee PKR 4,400.
Product page lists 'no minimum balance' for Gold; no salary threshold published.
Account-linked debit card; eligibility inherited from the linked HABIBMETRO account.
SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.18 (section 8) lists Premium/Classic issuance/annual/re-issuance fee PKR 3,300.
Account-linked debit card; eligibility inherited from the linked HABIBMETRO account; no published salary threshold.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Annual fee for additional spouse card is waived for Priority Banking customers.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.18 (section 8) lists Visa Infinite Metal Debit Card issuance/annual/re-issuance fee PKR 35,000.
Product page states 'Card will be offered on invitation basis only' to 'Account holders maintaining a relationship balance of PKR 100 MN and above'.
Supplementary cards fee per SOC: same as primary.
SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.17 (section 7) confirms PayPak issuance/annual/re-issuance fee PKR 2,200.
Product page states 'Balance required: None'. No salary threshold published.
Local-only card; cannot be used internationally or for e-commerce per product page.
SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.18-19 (section 9) lists FCY Premium/Classic PKR 3,300, FCY Gold PKR 4,400, FCY Platinum PKR 7,500. Same Platinum 3M-3-months balance eligibility footnote applies.
FCY Classic fee used here as the default tier; if a customer takes Gold/Platinum the fee scales up.
Card is available with Freelancer and Exporters Special Foreign Currency Account (ESFCA); no public salary or FCY balance threshold.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free for the first year; PKR 3,300 for subsequent years.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.20 (section 12) HABIBMETRO LADIES DEBIT CARD: 'FREE (FOR THE 1ST YEAR) / RS. 3,300/- (FOR SUBSEQUENT YEARS)'.
Women-targeted card; inherits from the HABIBMETRO Ladies current account on the customer side.
Note: product debit-card marketing page mentions Rs. 2,200/year for Ladies; SOC is the authoritative fee schedule and is used here.
Renamed from 'Visa Signature Debit Card' to 'Business Debit Card' (the Visa Signature Business variant) — this is the same card the previous pilot mis-classified as a consumer Signature card.
SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.18 (section 8) lists BUSINESS DEBIT CARD issuance/annual/re-issuance fee PKR 16,000.

Eligibility per product page: 'Business Entity / Company Account (Private & Public Limited) excluding corporate customers availing Running Facility/Debit Balance' and Partnership Accounts. No consumer salary/balance threshold.
Previous 'PKR 3,000,000 average balance / waiver' rule from the pilot was not found on the current Business Debit Card product page or SOC and has been removed.

gaps: No clean public consumer credit-card catalogue surfaced on habibmetro.com in this pass; SOC sections beyond debit cards were not catalogued here.
Public debit-card pages and SOC do not publish age criteria (min/max) for any debit-card variant.
Salary thresholds are not published anywhere on the official debit-card pages or SOC; all consumer debit cards are gated on linked-account eligibility instead.
FCY card SOC fee row is shown by tier (Classic/Gold/Platinum) but the public product page does not state which FCY tier the page is describing; pilot defaults to Classic.
Pilot's prior 'Visa Signature Debit Card' (PKR 16,000, 3M-balance waiver) was a mis-mapping of the Business (Signature Business) card and has been corrected.
